items.content_html: Typewriter Mode is a plugin that adds typewriter scrolling (current line stays at a fixed position on the screen), a highlight for the current line, dimming of unfocused paragraphs and more to Obsidian.

items.content_html: When copying and pasting from .md files into notebooks, multiple newlines are often created, making notes unnecessarily long. This simple plugin replaces >=N number of multiple empty lines with one or two empty lines, with preview and undo functionality.
items.title: WillLewis/newline-adjuster: When copying and pasting from .md files into notebooks, multiple newlines are often created, making notes unnecessarily long. This simple plugin replaces >=N number of multiple empty lines with one or two empty lines, with preview and undo functionality.
